recipe.title: Oops, PB&J Day
recipe.servings: Whoever heard the bread bag first
ingredients: chips or pretzels if morale is low
steps: Realize there is no dinner plan and that everyone is somehow still hungry.
Reach for the bread with the calm confidence of a person making a legacy meal.
Spread peanut butter like you're frosting a tiny emergency cake.
Add jelly until the sandwich feels emotionally supported.
Close the sandwich and press lightly. This is engineering now.
Cut it into triangles so it looks intentional and not like a scheduling failure.
Serve with chips if available, fruit if you're feeling responsible, and zero apologies.
Tell anyone who asks that tonight's menu is 'rustic pantry tasting.'
